# Gloucester City Council — AI crawler guidance
# https://llmstxt.org

> Official council tax, planning, bins, and parking information
> for Gloucester. Published by Gloucester City Council.
> Primary authoritative domain: https://www.gloucester.gov.uk

## Council Tax

- Council Tax hub: /council-tax/
- Understanding your bill: /council-tax/your-bill/
- Discounts and exemptions: /council-tax/discounts/
- Single Person Discount: /council-tax/discounts/single-person/
- Student exemption: /council-tax/discounts/students/
- Disabled person reduction: /council-tax/discounts/disabled/
- Severe mental impairment disregard: /council-tax/discounts/mental-impairment/
- Council Tax Support: /council-tax/council-tax-support/
- Discounts based on who lives with you: /council-tax/occupants/
- Living alone: /council-tax/occupants/living-alone/
- Students in your home: /council-tax/occupants/students-in-your-home/
- Someone is disregarded: /council-tax/occupants/someone-doesnt-count/
- Empty home: /council-tax/empty-home/
- Second home: /council-tax/second-home/
